case_number: Civil Family Transfer Application No.18 of 2022

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Civil Family Transfer Application No.18 of 2022 Civil Family Transfer Application No.19 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of CMA No.665/2022. For hearing of CMA No.668/2022. For hearing of main case. 21-11-2022 Mr. Khalid Mustafa Shoro advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Sajid Ali Soomro advocate files power on behalf of respondent No.1 in CTA No.18 of 2022, taken on record. By consent these applications are allowed. Family Suit No.57/2020 and Guardianship Application No.14/2020 pending before learned Family Judge/Judge Consumer Protection Court, Jamshoro are hereby withdrawn from his file and are transferred to the Court learned Civil Judge/J.M./Family Judge, Thano Bola Khan @ Kotri with direction to dispose of the same within two months and submit such report before this Court. Civil transfer applications along with listed applications stand disposed of. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
